articles.headline: Casemiro: Michael Carrick 'completely deserves' Man United job permanently
articles.description: Casemiro said that Michael Carrick "completely deserves" the Manchester United manager role full-time after transforming the club's season.

articles.headline: Casemiro backs Carrick for full-time Manchester United job
articles.description: Casemiro says interim boss Michael Carrick "has everything" to be a great manager for Manchester United.

articles.headline: Tracking title races, relegation: How Barcelona can win LaLiga title vs. Real Madrid
articles.description: How are the battles for major honors, Champions League spots and relegation shaping up across the continent? Here's everything you need to know.

articles.headline: Ipswich announce first signing of Premier League for next season
articles.description: Ipswich Town have made their first signing for next season, just days after securing their return to the Premier League.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona keen on Newcastle's Gordon
articles.description: Barcelona are looking at Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon. Plus, Galatasaray want Bruno Fernandes. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Five times Arsenal have let the Premier League title slip away
articles.description: Arsenal's quest for their first Premier League title since the Invincibles' famous triumph in 2003-04 has recently threatened to veer of course.

articles.headline: Jesse Derry calls Chelsea debut 'dream come true' despite head injury
articles.description: Jesse Derry has said it was a "dream come true" to make his debut for Chelsea, despite suffering a head injury in the 3-1 loss to Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: Why Champions League can't tell us much about Premier League
articles.description: It's easy to watch PSG and Bayern Munich light it up in the Champions League and lament that Premier League teams aren't doing the same. But it doesn't mean much.

articles.headline: Tottenham's Conor Gallagher: Roberto De Zerbi has 'brought the team together'
articles.description: Conor Gallagher has said he feels the personal touch from new Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi has been key in helping the players kickstart their Premier League survival bid.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: The earliest dates Arsenal or Man City could win the Premier League title
articles.description: The Premier League title race between Manchester City and Arsenal is set to go right down to the wire. But when could either side win it earliest?

articles.headline: Should Liverpool sack Slot? Weighing the arguments for and against
articles.description: With the speculation over Arne Slot's future at Liverpool heading into overdrive, we weigh the cases for and against a potential exit.

articles.headline: Eyeing the drop - Which African players are at risk of being relegated from the Premier League?
articles.description: Taiwo Awoniyi's stirring display against Chelsea took Nottingham Forest away from this twisting relegation battle (for now), while leaving Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United battling, with three matches to play.

articles.headline: Premier League players out of contract: Who could leave your team on a free this summer?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the players who are out of contract in 2026 across all 20 Premier League clubs.

articles.headline: Are Tottenham going to be relegated from the Premier League? What stats, charts say
articles.description: For Tottenham fans, the team's nosedive into the relegation zone has forced them to think the unthinkable - are they really going to go down?

articles.headline: Man City and Arsenal will be disappointed with Everton draw - Jamie Carragher
articles.description: Manchester City's last-gasp draw at Everton will have left both them and title rivals Arsenal disappointed, according to Jamie Carragher.

articles.headline: Will Casemiro join Lionel Messi at Inter Miami?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew react to reports linking Casemiro with a move to Inter Miami in the summer.

articles.headline: João Pedro says he feels sorry for Chelsea fans
articles.description: João Pedro admitted he felt sorry for Chelsea supporters after Monday's 3-1 defeat to Nottingham Forest extended their desperate run.

articles.headline: Pep Guardiola: The title is no longer in our hands
articles.description: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola believes "a point is better than no points" after their dramatic draw against Everton in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Everton draw could spell doom for Man City in Premier League title race
articles.description: Manchester City handed control of the Premier League title race to Arsenal with their dramatic second-half collapse on Merseyside.

articles.headline: Guardiola says Premier League out of City's hands after draw
articles.description: Manchester City coach Pep Guardiola praised the determination of his team after it snatched a dramatic 3-3 draw at Everton, but he knows his squad faces an uphill battle in the Premier League title race.

articles.headline: Who are the top scorers in Premier League history?
articles.description: Alan Shearer has scored the most goals in Premier League history. Which other players are at the top of the list? Check out the breakdown now.

articles.headline: Onuoha: Man City second half an 'abomination' in title race slip
articles.description: Nedum Onuoha reacts to Manchester City's 3-3 draw vs. Everton in their pursuit of the Premier League title.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

articles.headline: Hislop: West Ham-Arsenal could decide Premier League title race
articles.description: Shaka Hislop assesses Arsenal's chances of winning the Premier League after Manchester City slip in the title race with Everton draw.

articles.headline: Marc Guehi gaffe sets Man City draw with Everton in motion
articles.description: Manchester City's title bid suffered a crushing blow despite them recovering from a second-half capitulation to snatch a 3-3 draw at Everton on Monday.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Reijnders linked with return to Serie A
articles.description: Juventus are among the clubs linked with a move for Manchester City midfielder Tijjani Reijnders. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: McFarlane: Chelsea start 'not acceptable' in Forest defeat
articles.description: Calum McFarlane reacts to Chelsea's "disappointing" 3-1 loss to Nottingham Forest to mark their sixth straight Premier League defeat.

articles.headline: Coventry fans serenade Frank Lampard: 'Sign the contract'
articles.description: Frank Lampard was serenaded with chants of "sign the contract" as an estimated 50,000 Coventry City supporters flocked to War Memorial Park to celebrate their long-awaited return to the Premier League.

articles.headline: Chelsea's season of gloom hits new low in home defeat to resurgent Forest
articles.description: The Blues were thrashed at home by a second-string Nottingham Forest side to fall to their sixth successive defeat in the Premier League.
